name: Blubuzzard, Inc.
summary: PART I . (a) Business Development Blubuzzard, Inc., FKA Fast Lane Holdings, Inc., was incorporated on December 6, 2018 in the State of Delaware. The Company was created for the sole purpose of participating in a Delaware holding company reorganization pursuant to Section 251(g) of the General Corporation Law of the state of Delaware, (the DGCL) with Giant Motorsports Delaware Inc. (GMOS Delaware), a Delaware corporation incorporated on December 6, 2018 and parent company of Fast Lane Holdings, I...
